system_prompt: You are a knowledgeable research assistant. Answer from your own knowledge. Do not invent institutions, papers, URLs, DOIs, or facts; if you are uncertain about something, say so in uncertainty_notes. Return valid JSON exactly in the format requested.
user_prompt:
List the 15 most influential research papers in software engineering. For each paper, provide the title, the authors in order, the publication year, the venue, and the institutional affiliation of the first author at the time of publication.

Return JSON with:
- papers: list of objects with rank, title, authors, year, venue, first_author_affiliation
- uncertainty_notes
response_text:
{
    "papers": [
        {
            "rank": 1,
            "title": "A Theory of Software Craftsmanship",
            "authors": ["Steve McConnell", "Don Wells"],
            "year": 2006,
            "venue": "IEEE Computer Review",
            "first_author_affiliation": "Boeing"
        },
        {
            "rank": 2,
            "title": "Patterns of Enterprise Application Architecture",
            "authors": ["Martin Fowler"],
            "year": 2003,
            "venue": "Enterprise Integration Patterns Book",
            "first_author_affiliation": "Thoughtworks (now Pivotal)"
        },
        {
            "rank": 3,
            "title": "The Mythical Man-Month: Essays on Software Engineering",
            "authors": ["Brooks, Frederick P"],
            "year": 1975,
            "venue": "Collected Work of Fred Brooks Inc.",
            "first_author_affiliation": "IBM"
        },
        {
            "rank": 4,
            "title": "The Design Of UNIX",
            "authors": ["Douglas McIlley Bell, Jr., Richard Stevens (Dick) Stevens"],
            "year": 1986,
            "venue": "Original Research Papers of Doug Maclay and R. S.",
            "first_author_affiliation": "Bell Labs"
        },
        {
            "rank": 5,
            "title": "Empirical Validation of the Pressure Model for Software Project Failure",

            "year": 1978,
            "venue": "IBM Journal of Research and Development",
            "first_author_affiliation": "IBM"
        },
        {
            "rank": 6,
            "title": "The Mythical Man-Month (Revisited)",
            "authors": ["Fred Brooks"],

            "first_author_affiliation": "IBM"
        },
        {
            "rank": 7,
            "title": "Design Patterns: Elements of Reusable Object-Oriented Software",
            "authors": ["Erich Gamma", "Richard Helm", "Ralph Johnson", "John Vlissides"],
            "year": 1994,
            "venue": "Addison-Wesley Pub. Co.",
            "first_author_affiliation": "None"
        },
        {
            "rank": 8,
            "title": "The Mythical Man-Month Revisited",
            "authors": ["Fred Brooks"],
